-- code.go --
package code

import "context"

type Status string

type QueryParams struct {
	Name Status `query:"name"`
}

type HeaderParams struct {
	Name Status `header:"X-Name"`
}

//encore:api public method=HEAD path=/code.Head
func Head(ctx context.Context, p *QueryParams) error { return nil }

//encore:api public method=DELETE path=/code.Delete
func Delete(ctx context.Context, p *QueryParams) error { return nil }

//encore:api public method=GET path=/code.Header
func Header(ctx context.Context, p *HeaderParams) error { return nil }
-- want:encore.gen.go --
// Code generated by encore. DO NOT EDIT.

package code

import "context"

// These functions are automatically generated and maintained by Encore
// to simplify calling them from other services, as they were implemented as methods.
// They are automatically updated by Encore whenever your API endpoints change.

// Interface defines the service's API surface area, primarily for mocking purposes.
//
// Raw endpoints are currently excluded from this interface, as Encore does not yet
// support service-to-service API calls to raw endpoints.
type Interface interface {
	Head(ctx context.Context, p *QueryParams) error

	Delete(ctx context.Context, p *QueryParams) error

	Header(ctx context.Context, p *HeaderParams) error
}
-- want:encore_internal__api.go --
package code

import (
	"context"
	__api "encore.dev/appruntime/apisdk/api"
	__etype "encore.dev/appruntime/shared/etype"
	jsoniter "github.com/json-iterator/go"
	"net/http"
	"net/textproto"
	"net/url"
)

func init() {
	__api.RegisterEndpoint(EncoreInternal_api_APIDesc_Head, Head)
	__api.RegisterEndpoint(EncoreInternal_api_APIDesc_Delete, Delete)
	__api.RegisterEndpoint(EncoreInternal_api_APIDesc_Header, Header)
}

type EncoreInternal_HeadReq struct {
	Payload *QueryParams
}

type EncoreInternal_HeadResp = __api.Void

var EncoreInternal_api_APIDesc_Head = &__api.Desc[*EncoreInternal_HeadReq, EncoreInternal_HeadResp]{
	Access: __api.Public,
	AppHandler: func(ctx context.Context, reqData *EncoreInternal_HeadReq) (EncoreInternal_HeadResp, error) {
		err := Head(ctx, reqData.Payload)
		if err != nil {
			return __api.Void{}, err
		}
		return __api.Void{}, nil
	},
	CloneReq: func(r *EncoreInternal_HeadReq) (*EncoreInternal_HeadReq, error) {
		var clone *EncoreInternal_HeadReq
		bytes, err := jsoniter.ConfigDefault.Marshal(r)
		if err == nil {
			err = jsoniter.ConfigDefault.Unmarshal(bytes, &clone)
		}
		return clone, err
	},
	CloneResp: func(r EncoreInternal_HeadResp) (EncoreInternal_HeadResp, error) {
		var clone EncoreInternal_HeadResp
		bytes, err := jsoniter.ConfigDefault.Marshal(r)
		if err == nil {
			err = jsoniter.ConfigDefault.Unmarshal(bytes, &clone)
		}
		return clone, err
	},
	DecodeExternalResp: func(httpResp *http.Response, json jsoniter.API) (resp EncoreInternal_HeadResp, err error) {
		return __api.Void{}, nil
	},
	DecodeReq: func(httpReq *http.Request, ps __api.UnnamedParams, json jsoniter.API) (reqData *EncoreInternal_HeadReq, pathParams __api.UnnamedParams, err error) {
		reqData = new(EncoreInternal_HeadReq)
		dec := new(__etype.Unmarshaller)
		params := new(QueryParams)
		reqData.Payload = params
		switch m := httpReq.Method; m {
		case "HEAD":
			// Decode query string
			qs := httpReq.URL.Query()
			params.Name = Status(__etype.UnmarshalOne(dec, __etype.UnmarshalString, "name", qs.Get("name"), false))

		default:
			panic("HTTP method is not supported")
		}
		if err := dec.Error; err != nil {
			return nil, nil, err
		}
		return reqData, ps, nil
	},
	DefLoc: uint32(0x0),
	EncodeExternalReq: func(reqData *EncoreInternal_HeadReq, stream *jsoniter.Stream) (httpHeader http.Header, queryString url.Values, err error) {
		params := reqData.Payload
		if params == nil {
			// If the payload is nil, we need to return an empty request body.
			return httpHeader, queryString, err
		}

		// Encode query string
		queryString = make(url.Values, 1)
		queryString["name"] = __etype.MarshalOneAsList(__etype.MarshalString, string(params.Name))

		return httpHeader, queryString, err
	},
	EncodeResp: func(w http.ResponseWriter, json jsoniter.API, resp EncoreInternal_HeadResp, status int) (err error) {
		return nil
	},
	Endpoint:            "Head",
	Fallback:            false,
	GlobalMiddlewareIDs: []string{},
	Methods:             []string{"HEAD"},
	Path:                "/code.Head",
	PathParamNames:      nil,
	Raw:                 false,
	RawHandler:          nil,
	RawPath:             "/code.Head",
	ReqPath: func(reqData *EncoreInternal_HeadReq) (string, __api.UnnamedParams, error) {
		return "/code.Head", nil, nil
	},
	ReqUserPayload: func(reqData *EncoreInternal_HeadReq) any {
		return reqData.Payload
	},
	ScrubRequestHeaders:  nil,
	ScrubRequestPaths:    nil,
	ScrubResponseHeaders: nil,
	ScrubResponsePaths:   nil,
	Service:              "code",
	ServiceMiddleware:    []*__api.Middleware{},
	SvcNum:               1,
	Tags:                 nil,
}

			panic("HTTP method is not supported")
		}

			return nil, nil, err

type EncoreInternal_HeaderReq struct {
	Payload *HeaderParams
}

type EncoreInternal_HeaderResp = __api.Void

var EncoreInternal_api_APIDesc_Header = &__api.Desc[*EncoreInternal_HeaderReq, EncoreInternal_HeaderResp]{
	Access: __api.Public,
	AppHandler: func(ctx context.Context, reqData *EncoreInternal_HeaderReq) (EncoreInternal_HeaderResp, error) {
		err := Header(ctx, reqData.Payload)
		if err != nil {
			return __api.Void{}, err
		}
		return __api.Void{}, nil
	},
	CloneReq: func(r *EncoreInternal_HeaderReq) (*EncoreInternal_HeaderReq, error) {
		var clone *EncoreInternal_HeaderReq
		bytes, err := jsoniter.ConfigDefault.Marshal(r)
		if err == nil {
			err = jsoniter.ConfigDefault.Unmarshal(bytes, &clone)
		}
		return clone, err
	},
	CloneResp: func(r EncoreInternal_HeaderResp) (EncoreInternal_HeaderResp, error) {
		var clone EncoreInternal_HeaderResp
		bytes, err := jsoniter.ConfigDefault.Marshal(r)
		if err == nil {
			err = jsoniter.ConfigDefault.Unmarshal(bytes, &clone)
		}
		return clone, err
	},
	DecodeExternalResp: func(httpResp *http.Response, json jsoniter.API) (resp EncoreInternal_HeaderResp, err error) {
		return __api.Void{}, nil
	},
	DecodeReq: func(httpReq *http.Request, ps __api.UnnamedParams, json jsoniter.API) (reqData *EncoreInternal_HeaderReq, pathParams __api.UnnamedParams, err error) {
		reqData = new(EncoreInternal_HeaderReq)
		dec := new(__etype.Unmarshaller)
		params := new(HeaderParams)
		reqData.Payload = params
		switch m := httpReq.Method; m {
		case "GET":
			// Decode headers
			h := httpReq.Header
			params.Name = Status(__etype.UnmarshalOne(dec, __etype.UnmarshalString, "x-name", h.Get("x-name"), false))

		default:
			panic("HTTP method is not supported")
		}
		if err := dec.Error; err != nil {
			return nil, nil, err
		}
		return reqData, ps, nil
	},
	DefLoc: uint32(0x0),
	EncodeExternalReq: func(reqData *EncoreInternal_HeaderReq, stream *jsoniter.Stream) (httpHeader http.Header, queryString url.Values, err error) {
		params := reqData.Payload
		if params == nil {
			// If the payload is nil, we need to return an empty request body.
			return httpHeader, queryString, err
		}

		// Encode headers
		httpHeader = make(http.Header, 1)
		httpHeader[textproto.CanonicalMIMEHeaderKey("x-name")] = __etype.MarshalOneAsList(__etype.MarshalString, string(params.Name))

		return httpHeader, queryString, err
	},
	EncodeResp: func(w http.ResponseWriter, json jsoniter.API, resp EncoreInternal_HeaderResp, status int) (err error) {
		return nil
	},
	Endpoint:            "Header",
	Fallback:            false,
	GlobalMiddlewareIDs: []string{},
	Methods:             []string{"GET"},
	Path:                "/code.Header",
	PathParamNames:      nil,
	Raw:                 false,
	RawHandler:          nil,
	RawPath:             "/code.Header",
	ReqPath: func(reqData *EncoreInternal_HeaderReq) (string, __api.UnnamedParams, error) {
